title: Refactor max_value/1 to use Enum.max/1
prompt: Refactor `MyApp.Accumulators.max_value/1` from test_fixtures/enum_reduce_awkward.ex. The current implementation uses explicit recursion + a case with an `if head > other` check. Rewrite as a single call to `Enum.max/1` with a guard on empty lists returning `nil`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Accumulators do ... end` with just max_value.
tier_rationale: Recognize that explicit recursion is wrong tool when Enum.max exists.
